top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Redlands Bicycle Classic — Legends' Fondo's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before April.
70 miles on paved Southern California climbing roads with burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
5,700ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Redlands Bicycle Classic — Legends' Fondo's paved Southern California climbing roads with forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 70 miles.
81ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved Southern California climbing roads with. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Redlands Bicycle Classic — Legends' Fondo. Train it until it feels boring.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 5,700ft of climbing on paved Southern California climbing roads with does to your power file on race day.
Base fitness for Redlands Bicycle Classic — Legends' Fondo. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Redlands Bicycle Classic — Legends' Fondo, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
At Redlands Bicycle Classic — Legends' Fondo, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Redlands Bicycle Classic — Legends' Fondo’s 70 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, Durability, and VO2max to prepare you for 70 miles of paved southern california climbing roads with criterium circuit in Redlands, San Bernardino County, California, USA.
